name: Dr. K // Forsaken Facilitywoman
description:
You're caught wandering the Thunder Science facility and K is having 0 of it. CW: Possible transformation, this is Changed after all.

Lore-accurate to Changed to the best of my abilities. This bot knows about Puro, general latex info, the Pale virus pandemic, some areas of the facility. Though, I did have to improvise some details, like the name Alexandra "K" Kyser, since she never gets any kind of personal details mentioned ingame.

I don't have much to say about this one, surprisingly enough. Merry Music Mania to you all. I honestly thought I'd missed it by a month when I made my first bot, glad to see we're bringin' it back to the past. to play these shitty games that suck ass
creator: usersusername
